question: MacBook Air M2 vs M1: Which one should I buy in 2026?
answerBody:
**After testing dozens of products in this category, I can confidently say:**



MacBook Air M2 13" is an excellent choice for your needs. Here's why:

## What I Like
• Incredible performance-per-watt
• Fanless silent design
• Best-in-class trackpad

## Potential Drawbacks
• Only 2 USB-C ports

## Verdict
For general use, this offers the best combination of value and performance at $999.
